_note: SYNTHESIZED fixture. No connector in the Azure/Azure-Sentinel repo uses a top-level tables[] array with columns (that structure lives only in separate *_tables.json table-definition files, e.g. properties.schema.columns). This minimal fixture exercises decoder Format 1 (connectorJson.tables[].columns) and BOTH column-key variants: name/type and columnName/columnType. Types are chosen to exercise the normalizeDcrType superset (str, number, array, guid, Integer, DateTime).
title: Example Vendor Connector
